workflow.description: Orchestrator — leads the user from idea to working code, switching skills per stage

debug.description: Hypothesis-driven debugging — build a feedback loop, find root cause, verify the fix

zoom-out.description: Go up a layer of abstraction — map relevant modules and callers when you're lost in code

grill-me.description: Stress-test a plan or spec — relentless one-at-a-time interview with recommended answers

token-efficiency.description: Ultra-compressed responses — cut ~75% of tokens, keep full technical accuracy

world-cup-projection.description: Develop, debug, and extend the 2026 World Cup projection model (Dixon-Coles + ELO)
